summary: Completed full backend and frontend testing for المؤذن العالمي (The Global Muezzin) Islamic PWA. Backend: 14/14 API tests passing including real Gemini AI integration (source='gemini'). Frontend: All major pages load correctly with proper Arabic RTL layout, bottom navigation works, all key features accessible.

ui_bugs.issue: Page takes longer to lazy load - appears blank initially in headless browser

issues: Prayer times grid doesn't populate when location permission is blocked (expected behavior in test environment)

critical_code_review_comments: AI endpoints correctly using Emergent LLM key with Gemini (source='gemini' confirmed)
PWA manifest.json properly configured with app name 'المؤذن العالمي'
All real external APIs working (Aladhan prayer times, Alquran.cloud, mosque search)
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed user registrations for auth testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working. AI features use real Gemini via Emergent LLM key (confirmed source='gemini' in response). Frontend pages tested: Home, Quran, Ruqyah, PrayerTracker, More, Auth, DailyDuas. NotificationSettings page lazy loads slowly. Bottom navigation works correctly between all tabs. Location permissions blocked in test environment so prayer times grid on home page shows location prompt instead of times - this is expected behavior.

backend_apis: /api/health - healthy with app name المؤذن العالمي
/api/daily-hadith - returns hadith with text, narrator, source
frontend_pages: Home page (/) - hero image, next prayer card, daily hadith, bottom nav
Quran page (/quran) - surah list with 114 surahs, juz tabs
Ruqyah page (/ruqyah) - 6 categories with Islamic healing content
Prayer Tracker (/tracker) - 5 prayers with localStorage toggles
More page (/more) - feature grid, athan selector, theme toggle
Auth page (/auth) - login/register tabs, Google login button

pwa.manifest.json: accessible with correct app name and RTL configuration
